pi_items.source: Matches expected directory structure outlined in the prompt instructions.
Confirmed as the live API endpoint for the Oyez Project, a real multimedia archive of the Supreme Court of the United States.
Confirmed by querying the Oyez API endpoint which returns the exact case name.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env create_scotus_transcriber task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target directory structure requirements and API metadata match the prompt description, and the task correctly uses non-synthetic API data from the Oyez Project.
